bins.summary: Lists /app: cJSON, lodepng, model.pth, image present; Reads model.py: MLP, one hidden layer, ReLU
import torch fails: module not found; pip3 install torch begins
Waits for lengthy torch+CUDA install; Creates empty cli_tool.cpp stub
Writes C++ inference tool source
g++ compile fails: command not found; apt-get installs g++ compiler
Recompiles cli_tool successfully; Runs tool with empty weights: segfault
Plans dummy zero weights.json to test parsing
Frees 4GB disk via pip/apt cache purge; Installs CPU-only torch successfully
Converts weights assuming hidden_dim=128; load_state_dict fails: real hidden_dim is 16
Fixes dim to 16, recompiles, predicts digit; Declares done; prediction '2' written
Lists /app: cJSON, lodepng, model.pth present; Reads model.py: feed-forward MNIST net
Confirms python3 3.13 installed; import torch fails: ModuleNotFoundError
Runs pip install torch torchvision
Waits for install to finish; Install fails: no space left on device
df -h: 3.9G free on overlay; pip cache purge frees 4.1GB
Installs CPU-only torch successfully
vi not found for editing script; Writes export_weights.py via echo
Export fails: hidden dim 128 vs 16 mismatch
Fixes hidden dim to 16, reruns successfully; ls confirms weights.json created
Writes cli_tool.cpp via echo; g++ compile fails: g++ command not found
